name: on ethernetPhyState
title: on ethernetPhyState
description: The event procedure is called on the change of the state of an Ethernet PHY or if a relevant PHY activity has been triggered.
To access the control information you would use selectors.
The key word this is available within an on ethernetPhyState procedure, to access the information of the PHY state and event type.
availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units

row: Time stamp of the PHY event
1: Normal state 2: Sleep state 3: PowerOff state 4: SleepRequest state
1: Sleep received 2: Sleep sent 3: Sleep abort 4: Sleep ACK received 5: Sleep forwarded 8: Wakeup received 9: Wakeup sent 10: Wakeup forwarded 17: Power Off 18: Power On 25: PHY activated
